name: Oversized Woven Striped Lumbar Throw Pillow Neutral/Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Cotton Fabric, Indoor Use
description:
Add sophisticated style to your space with the Oversized Woven Striped Lumbar Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This neutral-color lumbar throw pillow features stripes in cream hues and is adorned with fringe on both sides for an elegant look. Made from 100% cotton fabric, this oversized pillow makes a comfy addition to your armchair, couch or any other spot. Plus, it features a hidden zipper closure for a finished look and easy upkeep.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
